title: Bright Smiles, Bright Future Competition
summary: This Clicks-linked electronics promotion is centered on iPads, making it a solid tech prize for shoppers who want a recognisable brand reward. It also brings some urgency because the closing date is one of the nearer ones in the dataset.
entrySteps: Open the official promotion listing, read the participation rules, and submit your qualifying entry before it closes.

title: Sta Soft Clicks In Store Luxury Getaway Competition
summary: Sta Soft is running a luxury getaway competition tied to Clicks, which gives the holidays section a premium but still accessible prize. It is a strong example of a retail promo that feels aspirational without being too niche.
entrySteps: Visit the competition page, confirm the qualifying purchase path, and complete the official entry steps before the cutoff.

title: SPAR Winter Warmers Escape
summary: Buy any 2 participating winter staples in-store and swipe your SPAR Rewards card to be entered. Stand a chance to win a 3-night Drakensberg stay for four, plus a R5,000 fuel voucher to get you there.

title: Sixty60 Weekly Basket Giveaway
summary: Place a Checkers Sixty60 delivery order during the campaign period and opt in in-app to enter. Weekly winners score a R5,000 Checkers voucher to stock up on favourites—delivered to your door.

title: Woolworths MyDifference Cash Boost
summary: Join or log in to MyDifference, complete the featured impact action, and submit your entry online. One grand-prize winner takes home R250,000 in cash, with smaller weekly cash prizes up for grabs.

title: Pick n Pay Voucher Giveaway
summary: Pick n Pay is a natural fit for the vouchers category because shoppers know the value is immediately usable. This entry gives the hub another recognisable grocery-led reward option.
entrySteps: Open the Pick n Pay site, look for the current competitions or promotions section, and follow the active giveaway instructions.

title: Pick n Pay Smart Shopper Tech Treats
summary: Scan your Smart Shopper card in-app on qualifying shops and tap the promo tile to enter. Win one of 10 Samsung Galaxy S25 smartphones, plus daily grocery tech deals for Smart Shopper members.

title: Nestle NIDO 3+ Grow with Love Campaign Competition
summary: Nestlé's NIDO campaign is built around Clicks cashback, making it useful for shoppers who prefer practical rewards they can actually use. It is a good example of a retail-linked prize that still feels low-friction to enter.
entrySteps: Visit the competition page, confirm the qualifying purchase details, and follow the brand's listed entry process.

title: Gummy Vites Back to School Competition
summary: Gummy Vites is offering a family travel voucher, which gives the holidays section another practical local getaway option. It is a useful mid-range travel prize rather than an ultra-luxury destination draw.
entrySteps: Open the listing, review the promo mechanics, and complete the required store or brand entry steps.

title: Standard Bank Credit Card 100% Spend Challenge
summary: Use your qualifying Standard Bank credit card for eligible daily spend to stand a chance to win cashback equal to that day's total spend, capped at R5,000.
entrySteps: Use a qualifying Standard Bank credit card during the competition period.
Make eligible card purchases during the day, excluding cash and transfer transactions.
Make sure you have a Standard Bank transactional account and received the related competition communication.
Each eligible day counts as one entry, with up to 11 entries in total before 30 April 2026.
entryChannel: Qualifying Standard Bank credit card spend

title: We Love Nedbank Competition
summary: Answer the Nedbank social media question and include 'WeNedbank' in your reply to stand a chance to win 1 of 15 cash prizes worth R1,000 each.
entrySteps: Visit Nedbank's Facebook or X competition post during the campaign period.
Answer the question posted on the social media page.
Include 'WeNedbank' in your reply.
Submit your reply before 23:59 on 30 April 2026.

title: MTN Promo Giveaway
summary: MTN frequently uses promo hubs and rewards mechanics for device and network-related giveaways, so this entry adds telecom relevance to the tech section. It also supports the South African positioning with a familiar mobile brand.
entrySteps: Open the MTN promotions area, select the active giveaway, and follow the official competition instructions.

title: Vodacom Rewards Competition
summary: Vodacom rewards and promo mechanics make a useful tech-oriented entry for users already engaged with telecom loyalty offers. It adds broader telecom coverage beyond the vehicle-linked partnerships.
entrySteps: Open Vodacom's site, look for the current rewards or promotions area, and enter via the active campaign hub.

title: Hinds Pick n Pay Smart Shopper Competition - Win a Suzuki Swift
summary: Buy qualifying Hinds or Southern products at Pick n Pay and swipe Smart Shopper, or buy online with Smart Shopper linked before checkout, for a chance to win 1 of 2 Suzuki Swift 1.2 GL 5MT cars.
entrySteps: Buy qualifying Hinds Spices, Southern Coating or Southern Grill products at Pick n Pay before 23:59 on 4 May 2026.
Swipe your Smart Shopper card in store, or link Smart Shopper to your Pick n Pay online or asap profile before checkout.
Keep your proof of purchase for verification if you are drawn as a potential winner.
Make sure your Smart Shopper profile is registered and opted in for communication.
entryChannel: Smart Shopper card, Pick n Pay online or Pick n Pay asap

title: Hinds Checkstar Competition - Win a Suzuki Swift
summary: Buy qualifying Hinds or Southern products at participating Checkstar stores for a chance to win a Suzuki Swift 1.2 GL 5MT. Write your details on the till slip and drop it into the in-store entry box.
entrySteps: Buy a qualifying Hinds Spices, Southern Coating or Southern Grill product at a participating Checkstar store.
Write your name, surname and mobile number on the back of the till slip.
Drop the till slip into the competition entry box provided in store.
Enter before the competition closes at 23:59 on 4 May 2026.
